feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets: Welcome back to Practical Systems. Today we're talking about on call rotation, and I'm joined by Priya, principal SRE at a payments platform. Priya, thanks for being here.
Thanks, Ethan. Excited for this one — incident response and on-call design is something I've been thinking about a lot.
Push back on the conventional wisdom for me. How does Notion fit into this picture?
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Practical Systems. Today we're talking about on call rotation, and I'm joined by Priya, principal SRE at a payments platform. Priya, thanks for being here.
summary.title: On-Call That Doesn't Break People
